error.UPM_INSFAIL_UNKNOWN: UPM could not be installed to due an unknown reason.
error.UPM_INSFAIL_RWFAIL: UPM could not be installed because it could not read or write to the needed folders.
error.UPM_INSFAIL_INCOMPAT: UPM could not be installed because it is incompatible with the system
error.UPM_INSFAIL_NOT_AN_ADMIN: UPM installation was terminated because it is not running as administrator/root.
